disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak ends, quarantine lifted. Learn about the rare Andes strain and the successful response. - facebook.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak ends, quarantine lifted. Learn about the rare Andes strain and the successful response. facebook.com
updates.summary_zh: Facebook 称汉坦疫情结束，隔离解除。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO NDTV
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布汉坦疫情将于7月2日正式结束。

updates.title_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes - The Independent
updates.body_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 美国结束汉坦疫情响应，隔离到期。

updates.title_en: CDC Concludes Hantavirus Outbreak Response on Cruise Ship - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: CDC Concludes Hantavirus Outbreak Response on Cruise Ship Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束邮轮汉坦疫情响应。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大34人汉坦自我隔离结束。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends; no cases in the US - WPXI
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends; no cases in the US WPXI
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦隔离结束，美国无病例。

updates.title_en: CDC ends US hantavirus response - The Hill
updates.body_en: CDC ends US hantavirus response The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦疫情响应。

updates.title_en: Person from MN is exposed to hantavirus, officials say risk is low to general public - Voice of Alexandria
updates.body_en: Person from MN is exposed to hantavirus, officials say risk is low to general public Voice of Alexandria
updates.summary_zh: 美国明尼苏达州一人接触汉坦病毒，官方称公众风险低。

updates.title_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称若无新病例，汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日宣布结束。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - AJMC
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes AJMC
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 正式结束汉坦病毒应急响应，疫情风险降低。

updates.title_en: US CDC to end hantavirus response, WSJ reports - The Mighty 790 KFGO
updates.body_en: US CDC to end hantavirus response, WSJ reports The Mighty 790 KFGO
updates.summary_zh: 据华尔街日报报道，美国 CDC 将结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: CDC Concludes Response to Hantavirus Outbreak from Cruise Ship - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: CDC Concludes Response to Hantavirus Outbreak from Cruise Ship Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束对邮轮汉坦病毒疫情的应急响应。

updates.title_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response as outbreak eases - Reuters
updates.body_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response as outbreak eases Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 路透社：美国 CDC 将逐步结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: CDC prepares to end its hantavirus response as American passengers celebrate the end of quarantine - KVUE
updates.body_en: CDC prepares to end its hantavirus response as American passengers celebrate the end of quarantine KVUE
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 准备结束汉坦病毒响应，美国乘客庆祝隔离结束。

updates.title_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: 国际公共卫生响应帮助控制荷兰邮轮上的安第斯汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: US disease control agency to end hantavirus response: report - TRT World
updates.body_en: US disease control agency to end hantavirus response: report TRT World
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 据报将结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: CDC's Hantavirus Response Concludes Post Cruise Ship Outbreak - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: CDC's Hantavirus Response Concludes Post Cruise Ship Outbreak Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束邮轮疫情后的汉坦病毒响应。

updates.title_en: Americans on hantavirus-infected ship end quarantine - NBC News
updates.body_en: Americans on hantavirus-infected ship end quarantine NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 感染汉坦病毒的邮轮上美国人结束隔离。

updates.title_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ CDC ends US hantavirus response The Hill Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska The Guardian Quarantine comes to an end for the last of the hantavirus ship passengers in Nebraska CNN Hantavirus Quarantine Ends for 18 Americans Exposed on a Cruise Ship The New York Times The hantavirus quarantine is over. Here’s what cruise passengers and scientists learned. NBC News Quarantine ends for all 18 Americans exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Vide
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒响应，美国爆发风险降低。

updates.title_en: Local influencer returns home after quarantine following hantavirus outbreak on ship - NBC Boston
updates.body_en: Local influencer returns home after quarantine following hantavirus outbreak on ship NBC Boston
updates.summary_zh: 当地网红在邮轮汉坦病毒爆发后结束隔离回家。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska - The Guardian
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 在内布拉斯加州隔离六周的美国人结束汉坦病毒隔离。

updates.title_en: Last American hantavirus cruise ship passenger released from quarantine - The Hill
updates.body_en: Last American hantavirus cruise ship passenger released from quarantine The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 最后一名美国汉坦病毒邮轮乘客解除隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for exposed cruise passengers, including two with NH ties - WMUR
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for exposed cruise passengers, including two with NH ties WMUR
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒隔离结束，包括两名与新罕布什尔州有关联的乘客。
